mapper.select: SELECT c.*, a.title as article_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.article_id = a.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment
AND status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, nickname, email, website, content, ip, user_agent, status) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToId}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{website}, #{content}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
